goal: Ship one additive diagnostics slice that distinguishes gold no-data/stale/league-visibility states and expose it through existing ops analytics consumption.

schema.change: Added additive view poe_trade.v_gold_mart_diagnostics with per-mart source vs gold row-count, freshness, lag, and league-visibility diagnostics plus SELECT grant for poe_api_reader.
schema.compatibility: Additive-only migration; no destructive statements and no mutation of immutable public-stash history.

api_report_consumption.change: Added analytics_gold_diagnostics() and wired analytics_report() to include goldDiagnostics payload with per-mart freshness/row-count/league-visibility fields and rollup status.

sanity_query.change: Added read-only sanity query for v_gold_mart_diagnostics to expose the new diagnostics slice during operator checks.

tests.change: Added targeted assertions proving diagnostics distinguishes stale, gold-empty, and league-gap states; verified analytics report includes goldDiagnostics payload.

commands.summary: gold refresh SQL inventory listed successfully

lsp_diagnostics.note: No SQL LSP server configured in this environment.
No SQL LSP server configured in this environment.

acceptance_mapping.row_count_distinction: diagnostic payload exposes sourceRowCount and goldRowCount per mart
acceptance_mapping.league_visibility_distinction: diagnostic payload exposes leagueVisibility + sourceLeagueRows/goldLeagueRows per mart for requested league

non_goals_respected: No mutation of existing public-stash data
